lessons.title: The Red Team Mindset 🧠
lessons.description: What is a Red Team? Adversary simulation vs. pentesting. Thinking like an attacker.

lessons.title: Campaign Planning & Scoping 📋
lessons.description: Defining objectives, rules of engagement, and building a comprehensive campaign plan.

lessons.title: Execution & Adaptability 🔄
lessons.description: Running the campaign, handling obstacles, and pivoting while maintaining stealth.

lessons.title: Objective Achievement & Post-Exploitation 🎯
lessons.description: From initial access to mission completion. Lateral movement and data exfiltration simulation.

lessons.title: Capstone Review & Ethical Reflection 🏁
lessons.description: Synthesizing the course, key takeaways, and the ethical responsibility of the Red Teamer.
